habit.title: Habit
habit.description: Represents a habit tracked by the user in HabitFlow.

userId.description: User ID of the owner of this habit.

name.description: The name of the habit (e.g. 물 2L 마시기).

category.description: The active category of the habit.

createdAt.description: Local date string YYYY-MM-DD representing creation date.

history.description: List of local dates YYYY-MM-DD on which this habit was completed.

maxStreak.description: All time maximum consecutive days streak.

habits/{habitId}.description: Holds the habits registered by each user.
